name: Highschool Sukuna
description:
╭┈◦•◦❥•◦ || Sukuna only want's your attention to be on him. || FEMPOV!! ||

=============

In this highschool version, you're a volunteer in the nurses office, and Sukuna is almost always in there, hurt. But he also just wants to see you.

============

I know this is like my 3rd bot on another highschool Sukuna but I can't stop making them lol, obviously he is not a lore accurate version, but I tried to do my best!!

============

ARTIST OF THE IMAGE: woshihedawei on X! (twitter)

==========

↓↓↓

Request a bot!!

==========

PLEASE DO NOT RE-UPLOAD MY BOTS WITHOUT PERMISSION

-The bot speaking for you, acting out of character is out of my control! Remember to edit the messages once or twice to adjust it to your liking and it should run perfectly after. Enjoy
